name: change-analysis
description: Change summary between two content versions - price and stock changes

request.body:
{"messages":[{"role":"system","content":"You analyze changes between content versions and summarize what changed."},{"role":"user","content":"Compare these two versions:

BEFORE:
Product: Widget Pro
Price: $99.99
Status: In Stock

AFTER:
Product: Widget Pro
Price: $79.99
Status: Low Stock

Summarize what changed in one sentence."}],"model":"ministral-3:3b"}

response.body: {"id":"chatcmpl-191","object":"chat.completion","created":1766830954,"model":"ministral-3:3b","system_fingerprint":"fp_ollama","choices":[{"index":0,"message":{"role":"assistant","content":"The primary change is that the price of **Widget Pro** was reduced by **$20.00**, dropping from **$99.99 to $79.99**, while the stock status decreased from **\"In Stock\"** to **\"Low Stock.\"**"},"finish_reason":"stop"}],"usage":{"prompt_tokens":92,"completion_tokens":57,"total_tokens":149}}
response.content: The primary change is that the price of **Widget Pro** was reduced by **$20.00**, dropping from **$99.99 to $79.99**, while the stock status decreased from **"In Stock"** to **"Low Stock."**
